title: Bindings, Scope, Closures, and Lifetime · Semantics Case: Lexical Scope
summary: Build configurable counters and validators without leaking mutable state across community-service widgets. Planned artifact: Add and verify the js lexical scope increment in a closure-backed state and validation library. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Resolve names through lexical environments and identify shadowing without guessing from call order.
Choose const, let, or legacy var from reassignment, scope, and initialization behavior.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
